steps.title: Subtract 332.5 from both sides
steps.content:
Start with $v = 332.5 + 0.607T$. Subtract 332.5 from both sides:
$$v - 332.5 = 0.607T$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘$T = \frac{v + 0.607}{332.5}$’: Adds 0.607 and divides by 332.5 — incorrect algebraic manipulation. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘$T = \frac{v - 0.607}{332.5}$’: Subtracts 0.607 and divides by 332.5 instead of subtracting 332.5 and dividing by 0.607. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘$T = \frac{v + 332.5}{0.607}$’: Adds 332.5 instead of subtracting it. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘$T = \frac{v - 332.5}{0.607}$’: Subtracts 332.5 then divides by 0.607, correctly inverting both operations. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
